originalTitle: Review & Preview: Big Tech’s $889 Billion Reality Check
summary: The market’s nonchalance over escalations in Iran came to an abrupt end on Thursday, as oil prices settled above $100 a barrel for the first time in two months. Ongoing jitters about hyperscalers spending too much on the AI buildout weren’t helping matters, and the combination of those factors wiped out hundreds of billions of dollars in market cap. The Nasdaq Composite sank 2.1%.
content: The market’s nonchalance over escalations in Iran came to an abrupt end on Thursday, as oil prices settled above $100 a barrel for the first time in two months. Ongoing jitters about hyperscalers spending too much on the AI buildout weren’t helping matters, and the combination of those factors wiped out hundreds of billions of dollars in market cap. The Nasdaq Composite sank 2.1%.
chineseTitle: 回顾与预览：大型科技公司 8890 亿美元的现实检验
chineseSummary: 周四，市场对伊朗局势升级的冷淡态度突然结束，油价两个月来首次突破每桶 100 美元。人们对超大规模企业在人工智能建设上投入过多资金的持续担忧无济于事，这些因素的结合导致了数千亿美元的市值消失。纳斯达克综合指数下跌 2.1%。
chineseContent: 周四，市场对伊朗局势升级的冷淡态度突然结束，油价两个月来首次突破每桶 100 美元。人们对超大规模企业在人工智能建设上投入过多资金的持续担忧无济于事，这些因素的结合导致了数千亿美元的市值消失。纳斯达克综合指数下跌 2.1%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
